title: Japanese Bao Buns with Sesame Cream
description: Soft and fluffy Japanese-style bao buns filled with a creamy sesame seed paste.
instructions: 1. Preheat a steamer basket with a clean towel to ensure the bao buns cook evenly.
2. Steam the bao buns for 5 minutes, or according to package instructions.
3. Meanwhile, mix the cream cheese, soy sauce, honey, rice vinegar, and sesame oil in a bowl.
4. Stir in the sesame seeds until well combined.
5. Once the bao buns are cooked, let them cool for a minute.
6. Split the bao buns in half and fill with the sesame cream.
7. Garnish with scallions and serve immediately.
